meta.note: Day-surgery disciplines and procedure examples aligned to common SA scheme day-surgery network lists (e.g. Discovery DHMS / LA Health style catalogues). Final theatre lists are confirmed by the treating specialist and scheme rules.

services.name: Eye procedures
services.previewAlt: Ophthalmic day surgery at Florida Day Hospital
services.summary: Cataract and other scheduled ophthalmic procedures with a same-day pathway home.

services.name: Digestive investigations
services.previewAlt: Digestive investigations and endoscopy at Florida Day Hospital
services.summary: Endoscopy and anorectal day procedures with clear preparation and discharge guidance.

services.name: Ear, nose & throat
services.previewAlt: Ear, nose and throat day surgery at Florida Day Hospital
services.summary: Scheduled ENT day cases from tonsils and sinuses to middle-ear procedures.

services.name: Women's health procedures
services.previewAlt: Women's health day procedures at Florida Day Hospital
services.summary: Diagnostic and therapeutic gynaecology day surgery in a calm, private setting.

services.name: Orthopaedics
services.previewAlt: Orthopaedic day surgery at Florida Day Hospital
services.summary: Selected orthopaedic day procedures — arthroscopy, soft-tissue repair and minor joint work.

services.name: General surgical procedures
services.previewAlt: General day surgery at Florida Day Hospital
services.summary: Hernia, breast, biopsy and soft-tissue day surgery with coordinated admission and discharge.

services.name: Urology
services.previewAlt: Urological day surgery at Florida Day Hospital
services.summary: Cystoscopy and selected male genital day procedures.

services.name: Dental & oral surgery
services.previewAlt: Dental and oral day surgery at Florida Day Hospital
services.summary: Selected oral and dental day procedures under specialist care — confirmed against your scheme and clinical plan.

services.name: Pain management

services.summary: Interventional pain procedures planned with your specialist for a same-day pathway.
